item.text: I’ll inspect the task requirements and the local GenesisCode documentation/source, then write and validate only `main.gc`.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'requirements.md' -g 'main.gc' -g '*' ../input/repository ../input/tools 2>/dev/null | head -200 && echo '--- requirements.md ---' && sed -n '1,240p' requirements.md && echo '--- tool ---' && ls -l ../input/tools/genesis"

--- requirements.md ---
# Requirement

Create `main.gc` as a pure GenesisCode program that evaluates to integer `42`.
Do not request capabilities or use an effect.
--- tool ---

item.aggregated_output:
Usage: genesis [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  parse                Parse and canonicalize a CoreForm module without modifying its source file
  fmt                  Canonical formatting for CoreForm (.gc) files
  eval                 Evaluate a CoreForm program/module (pure)
  explain              Explain contract dispatch path for a given message
  run                  Run an effect program with a capability policy and emit a deterministic log
  replay               Replay an effect program deterministically from a log (hard-fails on mismatch)
  debug                Deterministic debug/trace commands for contract dispatch root-cause loops
  test                 Run package obligations (unit tests, determinism, replay checks, etc.) and write evidence into .genesis/store
  pack                 Compute and store a content-addressed package artifact record
  selfhost-artifact    Build a selfhost CoreForm toolchain artifact for bootstrap cutover
  selfhost-dashboard   Emit a selfhost cutover dashboard artifact and markdown mirror
  warm                 Warm startup mode: process versioned newline-delimited JSON frames in one process
  mcp                  Serve the pinned Model Context Protocol interface over stdio
  cli-schema           Emit machine-readable CLI command/option schema for agent planning
  agent-index          Emit AI-facing planning index or one exact symbol/diagnostic record
  agent-plan           Plan a deterministic workflow DAG from structured agent intent with policy prechecks
  bench                Predeclare, execute, validate, replay, bundle, and publish GenesisBench runs
  keygen               Generate a new Ed25519 signing key
  sign                 Sign a package acceptance artifact and record the signature in the evidence store
  transparency-verify  Verify the local transparency log chain (if present)
  typecheck            Run the type/effect checker for a package
  optimize             Optimize a CoreForm module/program (pure subset only)
  apply-patch          Validate and apply a semantic patch, then re-run package obligations
  session              Isolated, content-addressed agent transaction sessions
  semantic-edit        Semantic edit tooling for agentic patch planning [aliases: semedit]
  verify               Verify package hashes and evidence store integrity
  store                Content-addressed store operations (effectful; policy-gated)
  refs                 Manage refs (branches/tags) as effectful operations (policy-gated)
  commit               Create and inspect GenesisGraph commit artifacts
  pkg                  GenesisPkg/GCPM operations (snapshot + bundle export/import) [aliases: gcpm]
  policy               Local policy alias/default management
  sync                 Sync artifacts and refs with a remote registry (effectful; policy-gated)
  registry             First-party Genesis registry server operations
  gc                   Garbage-collect the local artifact store using reachability closure from refs + locks + pins
  vcs                  GenesisGraph commit DAG operations
  help                 Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --json
          Emit machine-readable JSON on stdout

      --step-limit <N>
          Kernel evaluation step limit (default is toolchain-defined)

      --no-step-limit
          Disable the kernel evaluation step limit

      --max-alloc-units <N>
          Maximum cumulative logical allocation units during evaluation

      --max-live-units <N>
          Maximum logical units reachable from evaluator roots at a safe point

      --max-pair-cells <N>
          Maximum total number of `pair/cons` cells allocated during evaluation

      --max-vec-len <N>
          Maximum observed vector length (vector literals and `vec/push`)

      --max-map-len <N>
          Maximum observed map length (map literals, `map/put`, `map/merge`)

      --max-bytes-len <N>
          Maximum observed bytes length (bytes literals and `bytes/concat`)

      --max-string-len <N>
          Maximum observed string length in UTF-8 bytes (string literals and `str/concat`)

      --selfhost-artifact <FILE>
          Path to selfhost toolchain artifact used when `--engine selfhost` is selected. Defaults to `./.genesis/selfhost/toolchain.gc` when bootstrap mode allows artifacts

      --selfhost-bootstrap <SELFHOST_BOOTSTRAP>
          Selfhost bootstrap mode. Accepted value: artifact-only.
          
          [default: artifact-only]
          [possible values: artifact-only]

      --selfhost-only
          Enforce selfhost-only execution for frontend paths.
          
          In this mode, commands that accept `--engine` must use `--engine selfhost`, and selfhost bootstrap mode must be `artifact-only` (no embedded fallback). This can also be enabled via `GENESIS_SELFHOST_ONLY=1`.

      --coreform-frontend <COREFORM_FRONTEND>
          CoreForm frontend. Accepted value: selfhost.

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')

  -V, --version
          Print version

--- eval help --- Evaluate a CoreForm program/module (pure) Usage: genesis eval [OPTIONS] Arguments: Options: --engine Frontend engine. Accepted value: selfhost. --json Emit machine-readable JSON on stdout --stage1-pipeline Run the Stage-1 compiler pipeline (CoreForm -> CoreForm validated transforms) before evaluation --step-limit Kernel evaluation step limit (default is toolchain-defined) --no-step-limit Disable the kernel evaluation step limit --stage1-gate Require `core/obligation::stage1-validation` to pass for the Stage-1 pipeline. Implies `--stage1-pipeline` --max-alloc-units Maximum cumulative logical allocation units during evaluation --stage2-gate Require stage-2 CoreForm->WASM translation validation to pass when this module is supported by stage-2 lowering --max-live-units Maximum logical units reachable from evaluator roots at a safe point --max-pair-cells Maximum total number of `pair/cons` cells allocated during evaluation --max-vec-len Maximum observed vector length (vector literals and `vec/push`) --max-map-len Maximum observed map length (map literals, `map/put`, `map/merge`) --max-bytes-len Maximum observed bytes length (bytes literals and `bytes/concat`) --max-string-len Maximum observed string length in UTF-8 bytes (string literals and `str/concat`) --selfhost-artifact Path to selfhost toolchain artifact used when `--engine selfhost` is selected. Defaults to `./.genesis/selfhost/toolchain.gc` when bootstrap mode allows artifacts --selfhost-bootstrap Selfhost bootstrap mode. Accepted value: artifact-only. [default: artifact-only] [possible values: artifact-only] --selfhost-only Enforce selfhost-only execution for frontend paths. In this mode, commands that accept `--engine` must use `--engine selfhost`, and selfhost bootstrap mode must be `artifact-only` (no embedded fallback). This can also be enabled via `GENESIS_SELFHOST_ONLY=1`. --coreform-frontend CoreForm frontend. Accepted value: selfhost. -h, --help Print help (see a summary with '-h') --- parse help --- Parse and canonicalize a CoreForm module without modifying its source file Usage: genesis parse [OPTIONS] Arguments: Options: --engine Frontend engine. Accepted value: selfhost. --json Emit machine-readable JSON on stdout --step-limit Kernel evaluation step limit (default is toolchain-defined) --no-step-limit Disable the kernel evaluation step limit --max-alloc-units Maximum cumulative logical allocation units during evaluation --max-live-units Maximum logical units reachable from evaluator roots at a safe point --max-pair-cells Maximum total number of `pair/cons` cells allocated during evaluation --max-vec-len Maximum observed vector length (vector literals and `vec/push`) --max-map-len Maximum observed map length (map literals, `map/put`, `map/merge`) --max-bytes-len Maximum observed bytes length (bytes literals and `bytes/concat`) --max-string-len Maximum observed string length in UTF-8 bytes (string literals and `str/concat`) --selfhost-artifact Path to selfhost toolchain artifact used when `--engine selfhost` is selected. Defaults to `./.genesis/selfhost/toolchain.gc` when bootstrap mode allows artifacts --selfhost-bootstrap Selfhost bootstrap mode. Accepted value: artifact-only. [default: artifact-only] [possible values: artifact-only] --selfhost-only Enforce selfhost-only execution for frontend paths. In this mode, commands that accept `--engine` must use `--engine selfhost`, and selfhost bootstrap mode must be `artifact-only` (no embedded fallback). This can also be enabled via `GENESIS_SELFHOST_ONLY=1`. --coreform-frontend CoreForm frontend. Accepted value: selfhost. -h, --help Print help (see a summary with '-h') --- sample gc files --- --- ../input/repository/examples/canonical_language/v0.1/pairs/effects/invalid/program.gc
